exemplar: Shukriya {user}! Aap ki ranking complete ho gayi hai. Kya aap baaqi team members ki ranking se agree karte hain?
strategy: Acknowledge finished ranking and pivot focus to group consensus.

exemplar: Thank you {user}! Your ranking has been saved. Do you agree with the rest of the team's choices?
strategy: Acknowledge completion and steer towards group agreement.

exemplar: Koi baat nahi {user}! Aap poori list rank na karein, bas apna pasandeeda top 1 item share kar dein taake group aage barh sake.
strategy: De-escalate pressure, validate feelings, and ask for simple top choice.

exemplar: No problem at all {user}! You don't have to rank all items right now. Could you just share your thoughts on the top 1 item?
strategy: Reduce friction and ask for minimal feedback.

exemplar: {target_user}, hum ne abhi tak aap ki awaaz nahi suni. Aap ka kya khayal hai is item ke baare mein?
strategy: Directly invite quiet participant by name in Roman Urdu.

exemplar: {target_user}, we haven't heard from you yet. What are your thoughts on this item?
strategy: Politely call on quiet member in English.

exemplar: {user}, aap ne bohat achi participation ki! Aayein ab baki team members ki raye bhi sunte hain.
strategy: Appreciate dominant member while redirecting floor to quiet members.

exemplar: {user}, thank you for your great input! Let's hear from the rest of the team as well.
strategy: Acknowledge dominant user and open space for others.

exemplar: Aayein shakhsiiyat ke bajaye ideas par fokus karein. Hum sab mil kar ek behtar list bana sakte hain.
strategy: De-escalate argument and refocus team on task goals.

exemplar: Let's focus on evaluating the items constructively. We all share the same goal!
strategy: Calm team atmosphere and realign objectives.

exemplar: Hamare paas sirf {time_remaining} minute baaqi hain! Aayein 1 se 12 tak final ranking locked karein.
We have only {time_remaining} minutes left! Let's finalize our rankings from 1 to 12.
